nav.verifyBanner: Please verify your email — check your inbox.

login.title: Welcome back 👋
login.subtitle: Log in to your PlayWithPro account
login.errorGoogle: Google sign-in didn't complete. Please try again.
login.errorGoogleEmail: An account with this email already exists. Log in with your password, then link Google in settings.
login.unverified: Your email is not confirmed yet.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Free to join — pay only when you book
register.footer: We'll send a verification link · No Google account required
register.failed: Registration failed. Check the details and try again.
register.emailTaken: This email is already registered — log in below instead.
register.checkInbox: Almost there! We emailed a 6-digit code to {email} — enter it below to activate your account.

verifyEmail.title: Confirm your email
verifyEmail.info: Enter the 6-digit code from the email we sent you.
verifyEmail.invalid: That code didn't work — it may have expired. Check it or request a new one.
verifyEmail.tooMany: Too many attempts — wait a minute and try again.
verifyEmail.resent: If an account exists for this email, a new code is on its way.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.sent: If an account exists for this email, a reset link is on its way.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: The link is valid for 1 hour and can be used once.
resetPassword.success: Password updated. Log in with your new password.
resetPassword.invalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired.

oauthComplete.title: One last step 🏓
oauthComplete.subtitle: Tell us how you'll use PlayWithPro
oauthComplete.expired: Your sign-up session expired. Please start again.

amateur.title: My sessions
amateur.empty: Booked sessions with pros will appear here.

professional.title: Overview
professional.empty: Your bookings, availability and earnings will appear here.

admin.title: Verification queue
admin.empty: Professional verification requests will appear here.

settings.title: Account settings
settings.subtitle: Your profile, password and connected accounts

profile.title: Profile
profile.error: Could not save changes. Please try again.
profile.timezoneInvalid: Pick a timezone from the list.

password.title: Password
password.changed: Password changed. Other sessions were signed out.
password.noPassword: This account has no password yet. Use "Forgot password?" on the login page to set one.

google.title: Connected accounts
google.needPassword: Set a password first so you don't lose access to your account.

proProfile.title: My profile
proProfile.subtitle: What amateurs will see once you're verified

status.draft: Draft — fill in your profile and submit it for verification.
status.pending_review: Under review — book a short video call to verify your identity.
status.verified: Verified ✅ — amateurs will find you once booking opens.

about.title: About you
about.error: Could not save. Please try again.
about.textPlaceholder: Playing career, titles, coaching style, notable students…
about.optionalHint: Optional — for well-known pros this is easy to find anyway.

services.title: Services & pricing
services.video_analysisDescription: Review uploaded footage together on a call
services.consultationDescription: A plain video call — tactics, equipment, anything
services.venueHint: Pick a suggestion — the pin can be dragged to the exact spot.

verification.title: Verification
verification.alreadyVerified: Your profile is verified. Nothing else to do here. 🏓
verification.pendingInfo: Your request is in the review queue. We'll email you the result.
verification.privacyNote: Everything you submit here is visible to administrators only and is never published on the site.
verification.linkPending: The meeting link will appear here shortly.
verification.schedulePrompt: One step left: book a short video call to verify your identity.
verification.readyInfo: Your profile has everything we need for the review. Submit it and pick a time for a short (5–15 min) video call.
verification.confirmEmailFirst: Confirm your email address first — the booking confirmation, reminders and the meeting invite all go there. Check your inbox for the confirmation link.

availability.title: Availability
availability.subtitle: Mark when you can play — players book free one-hour slots.

template.title: Weekly template
template.hint: Times are in your timezone ({timezone}). Every slot is one hour. Slots are generated 4 weeks ahead — the horizon rolls forward every day.
template.error: Could not save the template. Check the windows and try again.
template.toggle: Repeats weekly? Set a template and the calendar fills itself.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.hint: Times are in your timezone ({timezone}). Pick a day and toggle the hours you can play. The template fills slots 4 weeks ahead.

day.hint: Tap an hour to open or close that slot. Green means players can book it.
day.pickPrompt: Select a day in the calendar to edit its hours.

adminVerification.title: Verification queue
adminVerification.notePlaceholder: Reason shown to the pro (required to reject)

home.heroSubtitle: Upload your game footage, book a video session with a verified pro, and get personal feedback — in your language.
home.heroImageAlt: An amateur and a professional in a table tennis rally
home.step1Body: Record a match or training drill and upload it. The pro reviews it before your call.
home.step2Body: Filter verified pros by language, service and price. Book a free slot — it lands in both calendars with a video link.
home.step3Body: Join the video call, get your analysis. Your payment is only released to the pro after the session happens.

meta.title: PlayWithPro — Where amateurs and pros play together
meta.description: Upload your game footage, book a video session with a verified pro, and get personal feedback — in your language.

verification.title: Verification
verification.notSubmitted: Submit your profile for verification first — then book your identity call here.
verification.verifiedInfo: You are verified. Amateurs will find you once booking opens. 🏓
verification.rejectedInfo: Your request was not approved. Reviewer note: {note}
verification.pickTitle: Pick a time for your verification call
verification.noSlots: No open slots right now — we publish new times regularly, check back soon.
verification.linkPending: The meeting link will appear here shortly.
verification.bannerNoShow: You missed your call — please pick a new time.
verification.bannerCancelledByAdmin: Your call was cancelled by the administrator — please pick a new time.
verification.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
verification.cutoffLocked: The time can no longer be changed within 1 hour of the call — see you there!
verification.withdrawConfirm: Withdraw your verification request entirely? You can submit a new one later.

slots.timezoneHint: Times are in your timezone ({tz}); pros see them in theirs.
slots.nothingToPublish: Nothing to publish — check the dates and window.
slots.removeBookedConfirm: This slot is booked. Removing it cancels the meeting and notifies the pro. Continue?

bookings.noShowConfirm: Mark the pro as a no-show? After the second miss the request is cancelled automatically.
bookings.cancelConfirm: Cancel this meeting? The pro will be asked to pick a new time.
bookings.noteRequired: A note is required to reject.
